title: OpenDelve Approval Receipt
description: JSON receipt produced by `opendelve approve sign`. Lives at approvals/<year>/APR-<year>-<counter>.json. Per eng review A5: this is an APPROVAL RECEIPT, not a cryptographically signed PDF. Cryptographic anchor is the git commit (sha) plus the Sigstore-signed binary that produced it.

id.description: Stable id. Format: APR-YYYY-NNNN. Counter resets each year per eng review A8.

subjectRef.description: Subject being approved (SOP-NNNN, WF-NNNN, shipment-NNN, etc.).

subjectVersion.description: Version of the subject at sign time.

subjectHash.description: sha256 of the subject's content at sign time. Binds approval to exact bytes.

commit.description: sha1 hex of HEAD at sign time.

signer.description: Identity of the person signing. v1 captures git config user identity opportunistically; OIDC actor is captured when run in a GitHub Actions runner.

typedName.description: Full name typed at sign time (--name flag).

email.description: From git config user.email at sign time.

role.description: Role being signed in (qa_manager, ops_manager, etc.). Comes from --role or matched against requiredApprovals on the subject.

githubActor.description: GITHUB_ACTOR env var if signing from a GitHub Actions runner. Absent on local terminal signs.

oidcClaims.description: OIDC token claims if available (GitHub Actions only). Opportunistic; never required.

provider.description: How the signer was authenticated. v1 supports git-config (local terminal) and github-oidc (CI runner).

meaning.description: Explicit meaning of this signature. Required by Part-11-style controls.

certificate.description: Reference to the rendered approval certificate PDF.

path.description: Relative path to the cert PDF in audit-packets/<year>/.

supersedes.description: Id of an earlier approval this one supersedes. Always null in v1 (supersession deferred to v0.2).

revokedBy.description: Id of a later approval that revokes this one. Always null in v1.
